description_long: This is a small, streamlined helicopter with a predominantly green fuselage and a compact, modern design. The main body is sleek, with a slightly bulbous cockpit area and a narrow tail boom extending to the rear. The helicopter features a main rotor on top and a tail rotor at the end of the tail boom, both appearing to be constructed from lightweight composite materials. The landing skids are simple and tubular, providing stable ground support. The cockpit windows are dark and wrap around the front, suggesting good visibility for the pilot. No visible registration numbers or detailed markings are present on the exterior.
description: A compact, green helicopter with a streamlined body, dark cockpit windows, and simple landing skids. The main and tail rotors are visible, and the design is modern and minimalistic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded cockpit, dark windows, and the narrow profile of the landing skids.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated tail boom, main rotor, and the simple tubular landing skids.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tail rotor and the tapering tail boom, with the skids visible beneath.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the tail boom, main rotor, and landing skids from the other side.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four main rotor blades, straight and narrow, likely composite material, colored dark gray or black with no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: Tail rotor is present at the end of the tail boom, appears to have two blades, oriented vertically, colored dark gray.
attribute_landing_skids: Simple tubular landing skids, metallic gray, with minimal crossbars and no visible footpads.
attribute_cockpit_windows: One large, wraparound cockpit window, dark-tinted, covering the front and sides, with no visible framing or markings.
